availabilitySemantics: AVAILABLE and AVAILABLE_WITH_LIMITS are BOTH positive primary availability (GREEN). Production 'available' vs canonical 'AVAILABLE_WITH_LIMITS' is PRIMARY_MATCH_MI_MORE_PRECISE, not a conflict. A true availability CONFLICT requires one layer available and another restricted/unavailable, or a materially different supported core scenario.

layer3_production.livePublicationState: Kazakhstan GEO is NOT live-published (homepage_eligible=false, publication blocked). Ranking/CTA/bonus data exists in geoRankings but is not shown to users.
layer3_production.productLevelModeling: overall availability + bonusAvailability + kycNote only; no per-product granularity

productStatusComparison.note: Legacy passport models a partial product set; production models overall availability only. Missing product-level detail in legacy/production is a precision gap, not a contradiction. Product-level differences are NOT flattened into overall status.

rankingReview.bybitRankedInProduction: yes in data (position 1) — but KZ homepage_eligible=false, publication blocked; not shown live
rankingReview.rationale: Production availability (available) aligns with MI positive primary availability, and KZ is not live-published, so no false live ranking claim exists. The disclosed gap: MI adds limitations, NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED, two unresolved conflicts, and rankingEligibility=false. A future ranking activation is a separate owner decision.

ctaPromoReview.rationale: No live CTA/promo is shown (KZ unpublished, bonusAvailability unknown). The disclosed gap: a global /go/bybit + CRYPTOBONUSW code exist in data while MI records global referral compatibility UNVERIFIED and ctaEligibility/promoEligibility=false. Any future KZ CTA/promo activation NEEDS_OWNER_REVIEW and must keep the 1,032/2,500 USDT amounts separate.

cf-kz-bybit-002.hiddenUserRisk: MEDIUM — the /go/bybit affiliate link routes to the global product while local entity/code compatibility is unresolved; relevant before any CTA

materialDiscrepancies: Global referral compatibility UNVERIFIED while production carries a global /go/bybit + CRYPTOBONUSW code (field 15 — HIGH, CTA/PROMO/ROUTING).
Conflict handling: MI formalizes cf-001 + cf-002; legacy omits, production only narrates part (field 23 — HIGH, ELIGIBILITY/ROUTING).
Ranking: production data would rank Bybit #1 while MI rankingEligibility=false and state is NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED (field 18 — HIGH, RANKING); mitigated by KZ being unpublished.
bank_card_purchase CONFLICTING in MI, unmodeled elsewhere (field 12 — MEDIUM, ROUTING).
Bonus amounts (1,032 / 2,500 USDT) modeled only in MI; must stay separate and never shown as global max (field 17 — MEDIUM, PROMO).
documentationOrPrecisionOnlyDiscrepancie: overall availability MI AWL vs production available (PRESENTATION/PRECISION).
spot/derivatives/margin/direct KZT deposit/withdrawal/Bybit Card: legacy UNKNOWN or unmodeled vs MI granular (RESEARCH_PRECISION).
production consumer behavior / binding activation / legacy production ownership (DOCUMENTATION_ONLY).

migrationRecommendation.rationale: Primary availability aligns (production available == MI positive primary; MI more precise). No user-facing availability CONFLICT. Legacy passport is evidence-blocked (precision gaps, not contradictions). Material gaps are ranking permissiveness, referral/CTA/promo verification, and formal conflict disclosure — all separate from availability and all currently non-live (KZ publication-blocked). An owner MIGRATION_5 decision can be taken but only WITH LIMITS: NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED, MEDIUM confidence, two unresolved conflicts, and UNVERIFIED global referral compatibility must be carried.

recommendationScope: Read-only three-layer discrepancy review complete. Primary availability aligns with MI-added limitations; no availability conflict. Current production (unpublished KZ) is SAFE_WITH_DISCLOSED_GAP for ranking/CTA/promo. MIGRATION_5 owner decision is READY_WITH_LIMITS. No migration, binding activation, production/ranking/CTA/promo change is authorized.
nextTask: CBW-KZ-BYBIT-P0A-MIGRATION-5-OWNER-DECISION-010 — owner decision (documentation only) on whether/how to proceed toward MIGRATION_5 given READY_WITH_LIMITS, carrying NOT_LIVE_VERIFIED + two unresolved conflicts + UNVERIFIED global referral compatibility. Binding activation, production integration, ranking/CTA/promo activation, and starting another exchange (e.g. MEXC) remain separate later owner-gated tasks.
